name: ravendb-mcp
description: Read-only MCP diagnostics server for RavenDB.

RAVENDB_URLS.title: RavenDB URL(s)
RAVENDB_URLS.description: Node URLs of your cluster, comma or semicolon separated. Use an https URL for a secured cluster. Example: http://localhost:8080

RAVENDB_CERTIFICATE_PATH.title: Client certificate path (.pfx)
RAVENDB_CERTIFICATE_PATH.description: Leave blank for an unsecured (HTTP) cluster. For a secured cluster, the full path to your client .pfx certificate.

RAVENDB_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD.title: Certificate password
RAVENDB_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD.description: Only if your .pfx certificate has a password.
